summary: Comprehensive UI testing of NEW platform mockup pages under /site/platform/*. All 6 platform pages render correctly with Liquid Steel theme (dark steel #0F1720, orange #FF6A00). Font readability confirmed - all headings use white (#FFFFFF) color.

platform_marketing_page.font_readability: All H1/H2/H3 headings use rgb(255,255,255) white color - clearly visible against dark background

elements_verified: Expandable cards with Business Impact and Suggested Action
Connected Systems grid (6: Xero, HubSpot, Stripe, Google Workspace, Slack, Deputy)
Available to Connect (3: Salesforce, MYOB, Shopify)
Detail slide panel with Data Types Ingested, Sync Frequency, Permission Scope, Disconnect option

design_review.fonts: Sora for headings, Inter for body, JetBrains Mono for metrics - VERIFIED

critical_code_review_comments: All platform mockup pages correctly implement the Liquid Steel theme
PlatformLayout component provides consistent sidebar + topbar structure
Font readability issue FIXED - all headings now use explicit #FFFFFF white color
data-testid attributes properly implemented on key interactive elements
Integration detail slide panel opens correctly when clicking connected systems
test_credentials: None required - mockup pages with static data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform mockup pages under /site/platform/* are fully functional. All pages render with Liquid Steel theme. Login page has pre-filled email, Google/Microsoft buttons. Executive Overview has 5 health capsules and attention cards. Revenue has 3 panels (Pipeline, Concentration, Churn). Alerts are grouped by severity with expandable cards. Automations have IF/THEN blocks with toggles. Integrations has clickable cards that open detail panels. Sidebar navigation works across all platform pages.

mocked_apis.note: All content is STATIC MOCKUP DATA - no backend APIs involved
